title: Shri Lingashtakam
intro: Read Shri Lingashtakam with Hindi meaning. Chant this hymn to praise the Linga form of Lord Shiva.
description:
|| Shri Lingashtakam ||

1. Brahma-murari-surarchita-lingam nirmala-bhashita-shobhita-lingam.
Janmaja-duhkha-vinashaka-lingam tat-pranamami Sadashiva-lingam.||
2. Deva-muni-pravararchita-lingam kamadaham karunakara-lingam.
Ravana-darpa-vinashana-lingam tat-pranamami Sadashiva-lingam.||
3. Sarva-sugandhi-sulepita-lingam buddhi-vivardhana-karana-lingam.
Siddha-surasura-vandita-lingam tat-pranamami Sadashiva-lingam.||
4. Kanaka-mahamani-bhushita-lingam phanipati-veshtita-shobhita-lingam.
Daksha-su-yajna-vinashana-lingam tat-pranamami Sadashiva-lingam.||
5. Kumkuma-chandana-lepita-lingam pankaja-hara-sushobhita-lingam.
Sanchita-papa-vinashana-lingam tat-pranamami Sadashiva-lingam.||
6. Deva-ganarchita-sevita-lingam bhavair-bhaktibhireva cha lingam.
Dinakara-koti-prabhakara-lingam tat-pranamami Sadashiva-lingam.||
7. Ashta-dalopari-veshtita-lingam sarva-samudbhava-karana-lingam.
Ashta-daridra-vinashana-lingam tat-pranamami Sadashiva-lingam.||
8. Suraguru-suravara-pujita-lingam suravana-pushpa-sadarchita-lingam.
Paratparam paramatmaka-lingam tat-pranamami Sadashiva-lingam.||

Phalashruti:
9. Lingashtakamidam punyam yah pathec-shiva-sannidhau.
Shivalokam-avapnoti Shivena saha modate.||

|| Iti Shri Lingashtaka Stotram Sampurnam ||

faq.a1: Lingashtakam is a sacred hymn consisting of eight verses (Ashtakam) dedicated to the Shiva Lingam, the iconic representation of Lord Shiva.
faq.a2: It is recited to express deep devotion to Lord Shiva. It is believed to cleanse the devotee of past sins, purify the mind, and bestow spiritual growth.
faq.q3: Does it have any specific benefits?
faq.a3: Yes, Lingashtakam is believed to remove poverty, enhance intellect, destroy negative karma, and lead the devotee toward spiritual liberation (Moksha).
faq.q4: When is the best time to recite it?
faq.a4: While it can be recited daily, reciting it on Mondays, during the Pradosh Vrat, or on the occasion of Mahashivaratri is considered highly auspicious.
